item.action: Require rollback-resistant threshold authorization for root authority-policy rotation.

progress.finding: A normal root transition must be exactly N+1 and meet both the trusted old-root threshold and incoming new-root threshold, counting each signer once; threshold compromise requires out-of-band recovery.
progress.verification: 7 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime
progress.trust_limit: Authorization depends on configured keys and any emergency out-of-band digest; it does not prove independent administration, secure custody, or downstream claim truth.

item.handoff: R-018 should add persistent trusted-root state with atomic compare-and-swap semantics, crash recovery, and tests proving two concurrent valid N+1 transitions cannot both commit.
